/CAL: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT/BWR: 09-09-16 /BWR1/REVSA: 09-09-16/REIN ORIG TC/PROB EXT: 09-06-19/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: DEFENDANT TO SERVE OUTTERM OF PROBATION AND RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM   /

/TWS/CH3 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 1 Y/CTS 53/X SENTENCES IN COUNTS 3 AND 4 ARE THEAME AND TO RUN CONSECUTIVELY/CTORD: 1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL TIME PER COUNT STAYED PENDING SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF 1 YEAR IN A DRUG AND ALCOHOL RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT FACILITY/4019HALF/DEF:IS ADVISED OF TOTAL OF 1 YEAR HANG TIME(6 MONTHS PER COUNT) IF HE VIOLATES PROBATION/IND/DEF:IS REQUIRED TO REPORT TO APD WITHIN 24 HOURS OF RELEASE/CTORD:DEFENDANT BE PLACED ON GPS MONITORING WHILE AWAITING PLACEMENT IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM TO BE MONITORED BY APD/X:IF DEFENDANT VIOLATES CPO OR DOES NOT FINISH RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT REQUIREMENT, HE WILL BE SENTENCED TO ONE YEAR COUNTY JAIL WITH NO RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT OR GPS CUSTODY CREDITS,  HE WILL BE GIVEN ACTUAL CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 53 DAYS ONLY/X:HARVEY WAIVER TAKEN FROM CASE NUMBER 16014520/X:ANY RESTITUTION AND CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDERS FROM CASE NUMBER16014520 ARE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THIS SENTENCE/SAORD/SA1:ROSS KALMIN; ANTHONY TORRANCE RAY/SAORD2/SAORD3/SA2:155 HAIGHT STREET #306, SF, CA 94102; 300 POST STREET, SF, CA 94108 AND 650 ELLIS STREET #24, SF CA 94109/DEF:IS TO STAY 50 YARDS FROM THE ABOVE MENTIONED LOCATIONS/      /X:ANY CIVIL RESTRAINING ORDERS CURRENTLY IN PLACE REMAIN IN FULL EFFECT/DEF:GIVEN INTERNET ADMONITION/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/PC/COLLECT/RESTV/X:FINES ARE PER COUNT/ /OBEY/ACCEP/CONTD:PROOF OF GPS ANKLE MONITORING DEVICE/DOP/

/CAL:TRIAL, PC 4011,6 REPORT FOR MBHC & DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE/X:COURT RECEIVES PC 4011,6 REPORT FOR MHBC,/X:PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE WITH CASES #16012996, 16013258 &  16014520 IS GRANTED,/STW:09-16-16/LTTR:09-16-16/CONTD:TRIAL & FILING OF CONSOLIDATED COMPLAINT/DOP/
/VD:08-16-16/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/X:4011,6 FOR MBHC ORDERED FOR M17 ON 08-19-16/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:08-19-16 IN M17 /CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC FOR MBHC REPORT AND TO SET/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/BAIL:50000//LDTR:09-02-16/987,2/DOP/CONTD PC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:08-11-16/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC FORMBHC REPORT AND MOTION TO CONSILIDATE/
/CAL: PROOF OF GPS MONITORING DEVICE/FTA/PROB ADM REV/BWI/BAIL: 50000/BWNUM: 1ST/
/CAL DISPO/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNS 3 AND 4, PC 166(A)(4), A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/REMA/BE/
